authority: brief section 4 Arm M Stage C (the novel-physics stage: raw commutator / Clairaut defect / plaquettes; CL-M4 + CL-M5) + Will's Stage-C GO

depends_on.note: bench code pinned in the frozen (post-M1) manifest (rule 1.9).

organ: IM_c_plaquette_v1: raw ordered commutators w/ ledger-only deviation folds; the sharp law C_raw == signed-residue-sum difference (corner deviations common-mode); predicate-selected witness from the pinned ladder; plaquette transport at per-axis-ulp and coarse dyadic steps.

predictions.PMC.1: Clairaut attribution: on every pinned cell (sweep + ladder, n=2 and n=3) BOTH orders close (value + ledger-folded deviation == the lane-certified truth) AND the defect is fully attributed twice over: C_raw == D2 - D1 AND C_raw == (signed residue sum of order 2) - (signed residue sum of order 1), exactly in Q - the fingerprint IS the account gap; zero unattributed defect anywhere. Units: cells.
predictions.PMC.2: the conditional law (CL-M4), two-sided with derived witness: PROTECTED cells (every float subtraction in both orders exact - measured from the ledgers, corner deviations being common-mode) have C_raw == 0, ALL of them (7 pinned, incl. anisotropic corners that round); the PREDICATE-SELECTED witness - the FIRST ladder cell whose signed residue sums differ - measures C_raw != 0 exactly as pinned (the FXMA1 binade-spanning cell; the trivariate FXMB2b cell also fingerprints); ladder cells whose residue triples differ but signed sums agree are the COINCIDENTAL-CANCELLATION class (HR134 33-cell lineage), counted (2) and recorded, never failed. K-M3 refute-row on either direction failing. Units: cells + witness.
predictions.PMC.3: plaquettes (CL-M5): holonomy H = the ledger-folded deviation of the pinned loop order; on every plaquette H is fully attributed, |H| <= the exposure bound (corner lane exposures + loop residue magnitudes) with ZERO violations, and the channel partition (per-variable + coupling + loop) closes onto the bound exactly; the protected plaquette (coarse dyadic steps, predicate satisfied) has H == 0 exactly; ulp plaquettes exhibit nonzero holonomy where pinned (both populations nonempty; all three trivariate faces scored). Units: plaquettes.
predictions.PMC.4: refusal honesty: the pole-corner probe refuses TYPED; zero refusals on the lawful battery. Units: probes + rows.
predictions.PMC.5: determinism: battery byte-stable x2 (sha256 over records).

referee: lane-certified truth (Stage A organ) cross-checked by closure on both orders; the law identity graded per-cell; populations pinned at dry-run.
status_move_rules: CL-M4 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PMC.1 AND PMC.2 AND PMC.4 PASS; PMC.2 FAIL = K-M3 refute-row (CL-M4 REFUTED, chain preserved, campaign continues). CL-M5 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PMC.3 AND PMC.4 PASS. Any other FAIL: halt-until-fixed.
t2_fence_ack: this stage makes NO G-claims and NO cross-fixture-invariant claims (manifest fence). The plaquette holonomy here is ACCOUNT bookkeeping on named fixtures, not a geometric-primitive claim.
